scripts.preinstall: node -e "const u=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(u.startsWith('pnpm/')) process.exit(0); console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1);"
scripts.vercel-build: pnpm --filter @workspace/marketing-site run build && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'artifacts','marketing-site','dist','public'); const dest=path.join(process.cwd(),'public'); if(!fs.existsSync(src)) process.exit(1); fs.cpSync(src, dest, {recursive: true});"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
